description: Windows target-host receipt boundary framework. Defines future receipt requirements for Windows service, tray, installer, and target-host validation. No service/tray/installer created. No target-host execution. Receipt contract only.

future_receipt_requirements.description: Real Windows target host (Windows 10/11) execution environment
future_receipt_requirements.requires: Windows VM or physical machine with target OS

future_receipt_requirements.description: Receipt from Windows service installation on target host
future_receipt_requirements.requires: Windows target host + admin elevation + service binary

future_receipt_requirements.description: Receipt from Windows system tray application launch on target host
future_receipt_requirements.requires: Windows target host + tray application binary

future_receipt_requirements.description: Receipt from installer package build (NSIS, WiX, or equivalent)
Receipt from installer execution on Windows target host
Receipt from Microsoft Store package submission
future_receipt_requirements.requires: Microsoft Store developer account + signed MSIX package

future_receipt_requirements.description: Receipt from end-to-end flow on Windows target host
future_receipt_requirements.requires: Windows target host + installed application + E2E test run
